justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified "next Friday" as June 5th and offered appropriate time slots.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully offered two available slots for the requested time and allowed the user to choose.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in two turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth, professional, and resulted in a successful booking without any issues.
